summary: Backend-only testing completed for final_report labor-override flow. Existing transition/override suite passes (5/5), but an added regression test found a false-positive override trigger for non-labor phrasing.

critical.issue: False-positive labor override in final_report mode: message 'make step 2 clearer' triggers LABOR OVERRIDE path (parsed as 2.0 hr) even though labor intent is absent.

minor.issue: Current override tests can pass even when fallback content is used; assertions do not verify semantic preservation of non-labor sections ('same facts' requirement).

action_items: Tighten detectLaborOverrideIntent keyword logic so generic verbs ('make/сделай') alone do not trigger override without explicit labor/total context.
Add positive guard tests for non-labor numeric messages in final_report mode.
Strengthen override assertions to verify non-labor sections stay semantically unchanged when override succeeds.
critical_code_review_comments: detectLaborOverrideIntent regex is over-broad: /make(?:\s+total|\s+labor|\s+it)?/ and RU 'сделай' can match non-labor instructions with numbers.
route.ts is very large (>1200 lines), increasing regression risk; flow-specific logic (override parsing/validation) should be modularized for maintainability and safer testing.

success_rate.backend: 83% (5 passed / 1 failed across executed scoped tests)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use the new failing regression test to verify intent-guard fix: /app/tests/chat-final-report-override-intent-false-positive.test.ts. Existing suite /app/tests/chat-transition-final-report.test.ts still passes.
rca of the issue: Root cause: labor override intent detector accepts generic verbs plus any bounded number, so non-labor messages containing numbers are misclassified as labor override requests. Repro: final_report case, send 'make step 2 clearer' -> logs show 'Final report labor override requested: total=2.0 hr' and prompt includes 'LABOR OVERRIDE (MANDATORY)'. Mitigation: require labor-specific lexical anchor (labor/total/итого/всего etc.) near numeric token, and remove generic standalone verbs from trigger patterns.
